title: [codereview-P4] pinctrl comment should reference exact Heltec V3 schematic version and pinmux macro validation
description: The new uart1_default comment mentions 'per schematics in comments' but does not cite the exact Heltec schematic rev or verify that UART1_TX_GPIO21 maps correctly in esp32s3-pinctrl.h. P4 style/traceability. Discovered-from project-LICHEN-g730. Fix before any close.
close_reason: pinctrl comment updated for exact schematic ref and macro validation; style traceability improved
